name: fast-strong
description: Route quick tasks to a fast model and hard reasoning to a strong model. Demonstrates cross-provider routing (a route can point at a different provider/baseURL/key).

routes.name: fast
routes.when: simple, quick, or short tasks: small edits, lookups, quick questions, formatting

routes.name: strong
routes.when: hard reasoning, planning, multi-step refactors, debugging, or anything requiring deep analysis
